title: Remember Me
prompt: Write a short message asking someone to remember you.
hint: Use polite and emotional language to express your wish to be remembered.
sample: Please don't forget me. I hope you remember the times we shared.
ja: {'prompt': '누군가에게 자신을 기억해 달라고 짧은 메시지를 작성하세요.', 'hint': '기억해 달라는 바람을 정중하고 감성적으로 표현하세요.', 'sample': '저를 잊지 말아 주세요. 우리가 함께한 시간을 기억해 주길 바랍니다.'}

local_pron: {'prompt': 'Nugungaejeseo jasin-eul gieokhae dallago jjalb-eun mesiji-reul jagseonghaseyo.', 'hint': 'Gieokhae dallaneun baram-eul jeongjunghago gamseongjeog-eulo pyohyeonhaseyo.', 'sample': 'Jeoleul ijji mal-a juseyo. Uriga hamkkehan sigan-eul gieokhae jugil barabnida.'}

title: Expressing Longing
prompt: Write a sentence expressing longing for someone you miss.
hint: Use emotional words to describe your feelings of missing someone.
sample: I miss you so much that I can't forget you for even a moment.
ja: {'prompt': '그리워하는 사람에 대한 그리움을 표현하는 문장을 작성하세요.', 'hint': '누군가를 그리워하는 감정을 감성적으로 표현하세요.', 'sample': '한순간도 당신을 잊지 못할 만큼 그리워해요.'}

title: Saying Goodbye
prompt: Write a polite sentence asking someone not to leave without a promise.
hint: Use gentle language to ask someone to stay or not leave abruptly.
sample: Please don't leave without making a promise.
